AUTH.HEADING: Connect repositories once, then keep source identity visible everywhere.
AUTH.DESCRIPTION: Alfresco uses green accents and Nuxeo uses blue accents throughout search and chat, so provenance stays readable even when both repositories contribute to the same session.
AUTH.MERGE_NOTE: Search and chat automatically merge the active identities you establish here.
AUTH.PROCEED_HEADING: Move into search once at least one repository is available.
AUTH.PROCEED_DESCRIPTION: Both repositories are optional. The UI adapts to whichever sessions are active.
AUTH.PROCEED_DISABLED: Connect to at least one repository to continue.

SEARCH.HEADING: Find the right document faster, and see where it came from.
SEARCH.DESCRIPTION: Search across Alfresco and Nuxeo with clearer ranking, stronger contrast, and persistent source cues so you can spot repository ownership at a glance.
SEARCH.FILTER_NOTE: Use filters below to narrow to one source, or keep both enabled to compare relevance.
SEARCH.QUERY_HEADING: Readable results, with explicit source identity
SEARCH.QUERY_NOTE: Choose a scope, search, then review permission differences below.
SEARCH.RESULTS_DESCRIPTION: Repository colors stay attached to each card, badge, and action so provenance remains obvious while scanning.
SEARCH.PERMISSION_DETAIL: {{username}} ({{source}}) found {{count}} result(s) for the same query.
SEARCH.NO_INDEXED: No indexed documents matched with your current credentials.
SEARCH.USE_COMPARE: Use the Permission Comparison panel below to check whether documents exist for another identity.

RESULTS.OPEN_IN_SOURCE: Open the original item in its source repository.

CHAT.RAG_HEADING: Ask across both repositories with explicit source provenance.
CHAT.WELCOME_HEADING: Grounded answers from your indexed content lake
CHAT.WELCOME_DESCRIPTION: Ask a question, stream the answer, and expand source evidence below the response.
CHAT.INPUT_LABEL: Ask a question about your documents

COMPARE.TITLE: Permission comparison
COMPARE.DESCRIPTION: Re-run this query as another user and inspect the difference.
